training_status: active (long walks, brisk intervals, uphill trails)

benefits.description: Food noise dropped, felt in control of appetite, fullness kicked in earlier, portion sizes came down naturally
Dropped 22 lbs over the course of the protocol

side_effects.description: Mild nausea in the first week, resolved quickly

protocol_notes: Started at 3 mg weekly, titrated up to 5 mg after 6 weeks, then to 8 mg. Diet consisted of lean proteins, vegetables, and carbs. Used BAC water and syringes from US supplier. Tracked doses in PepTracker app for consistency and trend analysis. Reduced from 2 meals per day to 1 main meal in 90 minute window.
